name: email-marketing-web
description: Painel administrativo para gestão de campanhas de e-mail marketing.
author: Daniel Arndt

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint:fix
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const path of ['.next', 'out', 'dist', 'coverage', 'tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', '.tsbuildinfo', '.eslintcache']) fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.clean:cache: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const path of ['.next', '.next/cache', 'tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', '.tsbuildinfo', '.eslintcache']) fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.clean:deps: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('node_modules', { recursive: true, force: true });"
